task_completion.description: Extract the 'Detailed Statistics' panel into a new layout file named layout_stats_details.xml.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'layout_stats_details.xml' open in the code editor. It should contain XML layout code including the strings 'Daily Active Users', 'Retention Rate', 'Session Length', and 'Conversion Funnel'.

task_completion.description: Replace the original heavy layout in activity_stats.xml with a ViewStub.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'activity_stats.xml' in the editor. It should contain a <ViewStub> tag with android:id="@+id/stub_details" and android:layout="@layout/layout_stats_details". The original heavy details_panel content should be removed from this file.

task_completion.description: Set up a click listener for the 'Show Details' button in StatsActivity.kt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'StatsActivity.kt' in the editor. There should be code setting an OnClickListener on the 'Show Details' button (e.g., button.setOnClickListener { ... }).

task_completion.description: Implement logic to inflate the ViewStub on demand.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the click listener in 'StatsActivity.kt', look for code that finds the ViewStub (R.id.stub_details) and calls .inflate() on it.

task_completion.description: Ensure the view's visibility is toggled if it is already inflated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'StatsActivity.kt', look for conditional logic checking if the inflated view (R.id.details_panel) is not null or already inflated, and toggling its visibility between View.VISIBLE and View.GONE.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine code editor or IDE (like Android Studio) to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Android Studio interface or another standard code editor with project files open, rather than just terminal windows echoing text into files.

integrity.description: The layout_stats_details.xml file was actually created as a separate file in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The project explorer pane or editor tabs should clearly show 'layout_stats_details.xml' existing in the res/layout directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used a ViewStub rather than just toggling the visibility of the original layout.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that activity_stats.xml actually contains a <ViewStub> tag and that the original heavy layout was removed, rather than just having its visibility set to 'gone'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/DashboardApp. The main layout file is app/src/main/res/layout/activity_stats.xml. The new extracted layout must be named app/src/main/res/layout/layout_stats_details.xml and must contain the strings 'Daily Active Users', 'Retention Rate', 'Session Length', and 'Conversion Funnel'. The activity_stats.xml must contain a <ViewStub> with android:id="@+id/stub_details". The activity code is in app/src/main/java/com/example/dashboardapp/StatsActivity.kt and must inflate the stub and toggle the visibility of the inflated view (ID: details_panel).
